entity.label: Chezib
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Deceitful, a town where Shelah, the son of Judah, was born (Gen. 38:5). Probably the same as Achzib (q.v.).

nodes.label: Chezib
nodes.description: Deceitful, a town where Shelah, the son of Judah, was born (Gen. 38:5). Probably the same as Achzib (q.v.).

verses.text: And she yet again conceived, and bare a son; and called his name Shelah: and he was at Chezib, when she bare him.
